decompose.project_context: Game project using ECS pattern. Systems follow component-based architecture. Events use the project's messaging layer.

step_descriptions.types: Create TypeScript types/interfaces for {{feature_name}}. Define component types, config interfaces, and state enums.
step_descriptions.data: Create data definitions for {{feature_name}}. Include balance values, lookup tables, and default configurations.
step_descriptions.events: Define events for {{feature_name}}. Add event types to the project's messaging layer.
step_descriptions.system: Implement the {{feature_name}} system class. Include init, update loop, and public API.
step_descriptions.tests: Write tests for {{feature_name}} system. Cover init, core logic, edge cases, events.
step_descriptions.wire: Wire {{feature_name}} into the appropriate runtime entrypoint. Add imports, instantiation, and event subscriptions.

criteria: No stub implementations or TODO comments
Systems registered in the relevant runtime entrypoint
Events registered in the project's messaging layer

decompose.feature_description: Turn-based combat with abilities and status effects

review.task_output: Created CombatSystem.ts with 12 methods. All tests pass.
